markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To explore AI tools for GTM workflows and plan a virtual event.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI-Driven Content Strategy:** A new workflow uses Cursor's Ahrefs integration to generate content ideas. It pulls non-branded keywords from competitors, groups them into pillars, and creates targeted article titles (e.g., listicles, glossaries).](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [**Rapid Web App Prototyping:** The team built two versions of an interactive "Fletch Checklist" quiz using Cursor and Lovable. This "vibe coding" approach enables rapid iteration and provides a concrete prototype for designers, accelerating the handoff process.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**Automated Social Media:** A Cursor skill now automates LinkedIn publishing via Ordinal. The team is also exploring Opus 1 for mass-producing and scheduling video shorts, creating a high-volume content engine.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
  - [**High-Value Virtual Event:** The team is considering a $22k virtual whiskey tasting with Acquired.io. The cost includes $7.5k for Acquired to source 25 qualified Series B+ B2B SaaS prospects, a high-value investment at \~$300/lead.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3220.0)

## Topics

### AI Tooling & Access

  - [**Cursor:** The team is adopting Cursor (using Opus 4.6) for all tasks, including debugging, to build proficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**GitHub Access:** Access to the "GTM brain" GitHub repo is blocked.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
      - [**Cause:** Limited seats on the Cursor team account.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [**Status:** Danni and Gloria are external collaborators; Will is blocked.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [**Ahrefs Integration:** Cursor's Ahrefs integration was configured for Will and Danni, enabling natural language queries against Ahrefs data.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)

### AI-Driven Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Manual content research is slow and inefficient.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new workflow automates content ideation.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
    1.  [**Input:** Provide a list of competitor websites.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
    2.  [**Keyword Extraction:** Cursor pulls non-branded organic keywords from those sites.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
    3.  [**Pillar Creation:** Keywords are grouped into strategic pillars (e.g., "AI Tools," "SEO Optimization").](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)
    4.  [**Title Generation:** Cursor creates article titles (listicles, glossaries) for each pillar.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)
  - [**Validation:** The process confirmed competitors Danni had already identified (HubSpot, SEMrush) and suggested new ones (SuperPath).](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)

### Rapid Web App Prototyping

  - [**Goal:** Convert the "Fletch Checklist" into a lead-gen web app.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [**Method:** "Vibe coding" with Cursor and Lovable to create a functional prototype for designers.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [**Input:** The checklist content was converted to Markdown.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [**Cursor Prompt:** "Make a quiz that you make progress in. What do you get? Give it a full breakdown and summary of the results."](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [**Result:** Cursor generated a polished, 3-file (HTML/CSS/JS) quiz.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
      - [**UX Flow:** Intro → 12 Yes/No questions → Email gate → Results summary.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The Yes/No format was chosen for its low friction, which maximizes completion rates.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)

### Automated Social Media Publishing

  - [**Problem:** Manual social media scheduling is a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2413.0)
  - [**Solution 1: Ordinal Integration**](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2262.0)
      - [A Cursor skill now queues LinkedIn posts directly to Ordinal.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2413.0)
      - [**Status:** Confirmed working for text posts; video uploads are under investigation.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2708.0)
  - [**Solution 2: Opus 1 for Video**](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2801.0)
      - [Will has used Opus 1 to generate \~150 video shorts.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2801.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Connect Opus 1 to the Ahrefs-driven content strategy to create high-volume, keyword-targeted video content.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2828.0)

### Virtual Event Planning

  - [**Proposal:** A virtual Irish whiskey tasting event with Acquired.io.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3156.0)
  - [**Logistics:** Acquired.io handles event page, registration, and whiskey box fulfillment.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3171.0)
  - [**Pricing Options:**](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3220.0)
      - [**Option A: $14,000** for 35 attendees sourced by GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3220.0)
      - [**Option B: $22,000** for 35 attendees, with Acquired sourcing 25 new prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3220.0)
  - [**Strategic Rationale:**](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3536.0)
      - [**Targeting:** Focus on East Coast prospects to expand reach beyond the Bay Area.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3445.0)
      - [**Value:** The $7.5k sourcing fee is justified, as the cost per qualified lead (\~$300) is well below the team's typical acquisition cost ($500–$1,000).](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3536.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3026.0)
      - [Request GitHub access for Will from Daniel.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3046.0)
      - [Invite the team to the Ordinal account.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=2708.0)
      - [Build a year-long event roadmap in Notion for Marcel's review.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3660.0)
  - [**Gloria:**](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3083.0)
      - [Request a demo invite to an Acquired.io event for Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3398.0)
      - [Get a more detailed run-of-show from Acquired.io.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3502.0)
      - [Define ICP criteria (Series B+ B2B SaaS) for Acquired.io's sourcing team.](https://fathom.video/share/xDj9YbZyG-_hai7i9SUQ1JBTV2f3yM1o?tab=summary&timestamp=3573.0)
